subject: Marshal note: hold Arboreal commit until visible proof
body: Pearly controller update: Arboreal reported model/value-proxy ready, but Fronded identified the human-visible gap. I directed Arboreal not to open a commit window yet and to add the smallest text-mode visible proof while avoiding Nebulous's files. Please enforce that queue/commit sequencing: no Arboreal commit window until the added visible proof is reported, focused tests are named, and active claims still show no overlap.
